mechanism: Azure Policy denies local authentication at the management group level. Exceptions require a policy exemption.
why: Local auth bypasses Entra ID — access keys and connection strings grant data-plane access invisible to the RBAC model. A key holder circumvents the entire access control model.

related.note: OIDC federation provides credential-free auth — makes denying local auth viable for automation.
Managed identity provides the Entra ID path that replaces local auth for automation.
Self-service exemptions make hard denies viable.
A compliant default does not substitute for a Deny gate.

violations: Storage account with access keys enabled.
Key Vault configured with Access Policies instead of RBAC.
